generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving type mismatches reported by the AGREE validator.
Ensure all identifiers in AGREE contracts refer to visible AADL features or declared helpers.
Repair contracts by aligning helper declaration types with expression types.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are defined within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use `int`, `real`, and `bool` for scalar type declarations in AGREE.
Helper declarations (eq, const) must have valid types (int, real, bool).
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid using implementation-level details in component type contracts.
Do not attempt to repair by adding architecture; focus on contract corrections.
irrelevant_topics: AADL scope rules for annex placement
AGREE assumption/guarantee placement in component types vs. implementations
